_description: Canonical test cases showing how articles of each type should be classified and where they should land. Use these to sanity-check config changes.

cases.name: CEMA Business Barometer publication

input.title: CEMA Business Barometer: European agricultural machinery industry sentiment at 3-year low
input.description: The June CEMA Business Barometer shows the European agricultural machinery industry business climate index dropped to -18, its lowest reading since 2023, with tractor registrations down across all major markets.

cases.why: Tier-1 association report + high-value strategic keywords + fresh + EU-wide → top of Must-Reads.

cases.name: AGCO Q2 earnings release

input.title: AGCO Reports Second-Quarter 2026 Results
input.description: AGCO reported Q2 2026 revenue of $2.4B, down 12% YoY, with dealer inventory levels remaining elevated. Full-year guidance revised downward due to slower North American demand.

cases.why: Tier-1 OEM IR feed + quarterly results + strategic keywords → Must-Reads.

cases.name: ECB rate decision

input.title: ECB Governing Council decides to keep rates unchanged at 3.00%
input.description: The Governing Council of the European Central Bank today decided to keep the three key ECB interest rates unchanged. Monetary policy remains restrictive to ensure inflation returns sustainably to 2%.

cases.why: Tier-1 macro update. Not a `data_release` or `association_report`, so it lands in Market Pulse, not Must-Reads. Bleeds into all EU country filters.

cases.name: UK construction daily news

input.title: Worker dies in fall on Mayfair site
input.description: Air ambulance arrives but worker pronounced dead at scene yesterday.

cases.why: Trade media, not strategic. Fresh enough for Latest Signals but wouldn't stay long — 21-day shelf life for trade media.

cases.name: Generic sponsorship / awards news

input.title: Pro Landscaper celebrates this year's Project Awards winners
input.description: The Pro Landscaper Project Awards 2026 winners have been announced during a ceremony within the Summer Spectacular event.

cases.why: Awards ceremony → event_announcement type (base score 25) + noise indicators penalty → archive only.

cases.name: Stage V regulation update

input.title: European Commission proposes Stage VI emissions standard for non-road mobile machinery
input.description: The European Commission today published a proposal for a new Stage VI emissions standard covering non-road mobile machinery, including agricultural and construction equipment. Full compliance would be required by 2030.

cases.why: Regulation policy has 365-day shelf life. Even at 60 days, recency score ~83. Perfect Must-Read candidate.

cases.name: Local farmer sale price

input.title: Top price of €16,200 at Breeder's Dream Sale
input.description: A pedigree bull sold for €16,200 at yesterday's Breeder's Dream Sale, marking the year's highest price for the breed at the Roscommon venue.

cases.why: Local farming trade news. Not strategic for Kramp. Should drop to Latest Signals or Archive quickly.

cases.name: Competitor acquires distributor

input.title: Granit Parts acquires Nordic aftermarket distributor NordicAg
input.description: German spare parts wholesaler Granit Parts today announced the acquisition of Danish aftermarket distributor NordicAg for €80M, expanding its Nordic footprint.

cases.why: Competitor news + strategic acquisition + fresh → high Market Pulse. 60-day shelf life keeps it visible for two months.

cases.name: Old data release still relevant

input.title: CEMA publishes Q1 2026 EU tractor registration data
input.description: CEMA today published quarterly tractor registration data showing EU-27 tractor sales down 8% YoY in Q1 2026, led by weakness in France (-15%) and Germany (-11%).

cases.why: Data release has 180-day shelf life. Even at 90 days, recency ≈ 50 but source (95) + article type (95) + strategic hits dominate → still Must-Read.

how_to_use: These cases document expected behaviour. When you tune config, spot-check the live API output for items matching these patterns and confirm they land in the expected section with the expected relevance score range.
